flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at The Catholic University of America rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.2k → $58.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The Catholic University of America rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.2k → $58.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The Catholic University of America fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
